# neon-ui

Neon-styled UI component library. Vanilla JS, CSS-in-JS (auto-injected).

## Import

```javascript
import { createKnob, showToast, createFxModule } from '../neon-ui/index.js';
```

## Components

### Knob
```javascript
const knob = createKnob({
    label: 'CUTOFF',
    value: 50,
    min: 0,
    max: 100,
    step: 1,
    color: 'cyan',      // cyan|magenta|yellow|green|orange|purple
    size: 'medium',     // small|medium|large
    formatValue: v => v,
    onChange: (val) => {},
    onRelease: (val) => {}
});
container.appendChild(knob.element);
knob.setValue(75);
knob.getValue();
knob.destroy();
```

### Toast
```javascript
showToast('Message', 'success', 4000);  // success|error|warning|info, duration ms
configureToast({ position: 'bottom-center' });  // top-left|top-center|top-right|bottom-*
```

### LED Button
```javascript
const led = createLedButton({
    active: false,
    color: 'cyan',
    onToggle: (active) => {}
});
led.setActive(true);
```

### Machine Button
```javascript
const btn = createMachineButton({
    label: 'PLAY',
    color: 'green',
    onClick: () => {}
});
btn.setActive(true);
btn.setPulsing(true);
```

### Action Button
```javascript
const btn = createActionButton({
    label: 'AI GEN',
    variant: 'primary',  // primary|secondary|danger
    onClick: () => {}
});
btn.setDisabled(true);
```

### Step Button / Grid
```javascript
const step = createStepButton({
    index: 0,
    state: 'off',       // off|normal|accented
    onToggle: (state) => {}
});

const grid = createStepGrid({
    steps: 16,
    onStepToggle: (index, state) => {},
    onStepClick: (index, event) => {}
});
grid.setStep(0, 'accented');
grid.setActiveStep(4);
```

### FX Module
```javascript
const module = createFxModule({
    name: 'FILTER',
    enabled: false,
    controls: [
        { label: 'CUTOFF', value: 2000, min: 20, max: 20000, onChange: v => {} },
        { label: 'RESO', value: 5, min: 0, max: 30, onChange: v => {} }
    ],
    onToggle: (enabled) => {}
});
module.setEnabled(true);
module.setControlValue('CUTOFF', 1000);
module.setFocus(true);  // AI focus highlight
```

### FX Pager
```javascript
const pager = createFxPager({
    pages: [
        [{ name: 'FILTER', controls: [...] }, { name: 'REVERB', controls: [...] }],
        [{ name: 'COMP', controls: [...] }]
    ],
    onPageChange: (pageIndex) => {}
});
pager.setPage(1);
```

### Panel
```javascript
const panel = createPanel({
    title: 'SETTINGS',
    collapsible: false
});
panel.element.appendChild(content);
```

### Input / Textarea
```javascript
const input = createInput({
    placeholder: 'Enter name...',
    value: '',
    color: 'green',
    onChange: (val) => {}
});

const textarea = createTextarea({
    placeholder: 'Description...',
    rows: 3,
    onChange: (val) => {}
});
```

### Sidebar
```javascript
const sidebar = createSidebar({
    title: 'ACTIVITY',
    width: 320,
    onClose: () => {}
});
sidebar.open();
sidebar.close();
sidebar.toggle();
```

### Feed Item / Feed
```javascript
const item = createFeedItem({
    title: 'Track Name',
    thumbnail: 'url',
    stats: { plays: 100, likes: 50 },
    user: { username: 'user', avatar: 'url' },
    onClick: () => {},
    onLike: () => {},
    onDelete: () => {}
});

const feed = createFeed({
    items: [...],
    loading: false,
    emptyMessage: 'No tracks'
});
feed.setItems(newItems);
feed.setLoading(true);
```

### Spectrum Analyzer
```javascript
const analyzer = createSpectrumAnalyzer({
    audioContext: ctx,
    sourceNode: source,
    width: 200,
    height: 60,
    barColor: '#00ffff'
});
container.appendChild(analyzer.element);
analyzer.start();
analyzer.stop();
```

### Keyboard
```javascript
const keyboard = createKeyboard({
    startOctave: 3,
    octaves: 2,
    onNoteOn: (note, velocity) => {},
    onNoteOff: (note) => {}
});
keyboard.setActiveNote(60);
```

## Return Pattern

All create* functions return:
```javascript
{
    element,      // DOM element to append
    destroy(),    // Cleanup function
    // + component-specific methods
}
```

## Colors

All components support: cyan, magenta, yellow, green, orange, purple
